name.en-US: On the Occult Works of Nature

description.en-US: A letter to an unnamed knight on the causes of the "hidden" effects of natural bodies — magnetism, the influence of celestial bodies, and similar phenomena — and what can be known about them by reason.
description.la: Epistola militi cuidam, de causis operationum occultarum corporum naturalium — magnetismo, influxu corporum caelestium — et quid de eis ratione cognosci possit.

sources.description: English translation by Joseph B. McAllister. Mirrored via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain), mirrored from dhspriory.org via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
